event_hubs.name: evh-patient-vitals
event_hubs.description: Real-time patient vitals: heart rate, blood pressure, SpO2, temperature

event_hubs.name: evh-icu-alerts
event_hubs.description: ICU critical alerts and threshold breaches

stream_analytics_job.name: asa-healthcare-vitals
stream_analytics_job.description: Real-time processing of patient vitals with threshold alerting

transformation.name: VitalsProcessing
transformation.query:
-- Tumbling window: aggregate vitals every 5 minutes
SELECT
    patient_id,
    device_id,
    ward_id,
    AVG(heart_rate) AS avg_heart_rate,
    MAX(heart_rate) AS max_heart_rate,
    MIN(heart_rate) AS min_heart_rate,
    AVG(blood_pressure_systolic) AS avg_bp_systolic,
    AVG(blood_pressure_diastolic) AS avg_bp_diastolic,
    AVG(spo2) AS avg_spo2,
    AVG(temperature) AS avg_temperature,
    COUNT(*) AS reading_count,
    System.Timestamp() AS window_end_time
INTO ADLSBronzeOutput
FROM PatientVitals TIMESTAMP BY event_time
GROUP BY
    patient_id,
    device_id,
    ward_id,
    TumblingWindow(minute, 5);

-- Alert query: detect critical thresholds immediately
SELECT
    patient_id,
    device_id,
    ward_id,
    heart_rate,
    spo2,
    blood_pressure_systolic,
    temperature,
    event_time,
    CASE
        WHEN heart_rate > 150 OR heart_rate < 40 THEN 'CRITICAL_HR'
        WHEN spo2 < 90 THEN 'CRITICAL_SPO2'
        WHEN blood_pressure_systolic > 180 THEN 'CRITICAL_BP'
        WHEN temperature > 39.5 THEN 'HIGH_FEVER'
        ELSE 'WARNING'
    END AS alert_type
INTO AlertsOutput
FROM PatientVitals TIMESTAMP BY event_time
WHERE
    heart_rate > 150 OR heart_rate < 40
    OR spo2 < 90
    OR blood_pressure_systolic > 180
    OR temperature > 39.5;
